name: cursor-voice-assistant
description: Interact with Cursor AI chat using voice input — speak prompts instead of typing them.

enumDescriptions: Free Windows Speech Recognition via System.Speech (no API key or browser needed)
OpenAI Whisper API (requires API key, higher accuracy, records audio then transcribes)
voiceAssistant.transcriptionEngine.description: Select the transcription engine to use.

voiceAssistant.whisperApiKey.description: OpenAI API key for Whisper transcription (engine: whisperAPI).

voiceAssistant.groqApiKey.description: Groq API key for AI prompt cleanup (fast, free tier). Get one at https://console.groq.com/keys

voiceAssistant.geminiApiKey.description: Google Gemini API key for AI prompt cleanup (250 req/day free). Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

enumDescriptions: Groq (llama3-8b-8192) — very fast, generous free tier
voiceAssistant.aiCleanupProvider.description: Which AI provider to use for the "Clean Prompt" feature.

enumDescriptions: Copy transcription to clipboard (paste into Cursor chat with Ctrl+V)
Insert transcription at cursor position in active editor
Copy to clipboard AND insert into active editor
voiceAssistant.outputMode.description: Where to send the transcribed text.

voiceAssistant.autoOpenChat.description: Automatically open Cursor AI chat after transcription completes.

voiceAssistant.silenceTimeout.description: Seconds of silence before recording automatically stops.

voiceAssistant.enablePromptCleanup.description: Remove filler words (um, uh, like) and normalize punctuation.

voiceAssistant.enableVoiceCommands.description: Enable voice commands like 'stop recording', 'new line', 'send it'.

voiceAssistant.showRealtimePreview.description: Show real-time transcription preview in the Voice Assistant panel.
